text: Welcome to Sunny Learning Time. First choose or create a learner profile on the home page. Then choose a subject. Math and Spelling are ready now, and more subjects are on the way.
Welcome to Sunny Learning Time. First choose or create a learner profile. Then pick a subject below. Math and Spelling are ready now.
Welcome to Math. Select a math skill to work on below. Notice what you last used and what is currently recommended.
Welcome to Spelling. Listen to the word, type the spelling, and tap Hint if you want a few letters revealed.
Your learner profile is selected. Now choose a subject like Math or Spelling.
Select a math skill to work on below. Notice what you last used and what is currently recommended.
